title: Spring Art Walk
description: Join 20+ local artists showcasing work along Main Street. Live music, food vendors, and hands-on art activities for all ages.

title: Poetry & Music Open Mic
description: Monthly open mic night for poets, musicians, and storytellers. Sign up starts at 6:30 PM. All skill levels welcome.

title: Intro to Wheel Throwing
description: Learn the basics of pottery wheel throwing with Sophia Chen. All materials provided. Limited to 12 participants.

title: Heritage Weaving Workshop
description: Join Nina Ramirez for a hands-on introduction to traditional weaving techniques. Bring your creativity — looms and materials provided.

title: Summer Community Showcase
description: Create Bastrop's biggest event of the year! Art displays, live performances, dance, theater, and a community mural project. Free and open to all.
